metadata.description: SDD — Spec Driven Development plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: sdd-spec
plugins.description: Spec-driven development workflow — structured phases from requirements to tested, reviewed code

plugins.name: sdd-roi
plugins.description: ROI measurement — track time saved, cost efficiency, and profitability of spec-driven development

plugins.name: sdd-graph
plugins.description: Structural code intelligence — pre-computes dependency graphs, endpoint flows, entity models, and service call graphs to reduce token consumption and enable impact analysis
